chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2831 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.12498/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025 Mr.M.Aizaz Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Per learned counsel for the petitioner notice has been assailed herein, however, he states that the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the Department that the impugned notice may be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken their against. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
